summary: Verified both fixes: (1) GET /api/points/leaderboard returns 200 with valid payload - 8/8 backend tests pass confirming KeyError fix with safe defaults. (2) Wallet modal shows all 5 wallet options (MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, Rainbow, WalletConnect, Browser Wallet) reliably on both desktop and mobile. WalletConnect shows QR code flow - NO skeleton placeholders visible.

issues: Minor React warning: 'errorCorrection' prop should be lowercase 'errorcorrection' - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ points_system.py get_points_leaderboard() uses safe defaults: player.get('points', 0) or 0, player.get('level', 1) or 1
✓ Weekly points calculation uses safe access: t.get('amount') or 0 for null-safe summation
✓ wagmi.js: multiInjectedProviderDiscovery=false prevents wallet discovery skeleton issues
✓ wagmi.js: Explicit wallet list [metaMaskWallet, coinbaseWallet, rainbowWallet, walletConnectWallet, injectedWallet] ensures predictable rendering
✓ Web3Provider.js: RainbowKitProvider modalSize='compact' improves modal performance

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Wallet modal working on desktop and mobile

context_for_next_testing_agent: Leaderboard KeyError fix verified with 8 backend tests. Wallet connect modal fix verified via Playwright on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). All 5 wallet options visible: MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, Rainbow, WalletConnect, Browser Wallet. WalletConnect shows QR code properly - no skeleton placeholders. The fix involved disabling multiInjectedProviderDiscovery and using explicit static wallet list.

details: Response has correct structure with 'leaderboard' array and 'generated_at' timestamp
All entries have required fields: rank, address, nickname, total_points, weekly_points, level, is_nft_holder, last_active
Safe defaults prevent KeyError: points=0, level=1, weekly_points=0
Desktop: Connect Wallet button opens modal with 5 wallet options
Mobile: Connect Wallet button opens modal with 5 wallet options
Wallet options: MetaMask, Coinbase Wallet, Rainbow, WalletConnect, Browser Wallet
WalletConnect: Clicking shows QR code 'Scan with your phone' - NOT skeleton placeholders
multiInjectedProviderDiscovery=false prevents dynamic wallet discovery issues
Explicit wallet list ensures predictable rendering on Telegram/mobile

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/points/leaderboard?limit=10: 200 OK - Valid leaderboard with all fields

frontend_pages_tested.Desktop (1920x1080): Play Now -> Main Menu -> Connect Wallet -> Modal with 5 wallet options
frontend_pages_tested.Mobile (390x844): Play Now -> Main Menu -> Connect Wallet -> Modal with 5 wallet options -> WalletConnect -> QR code

rca_of_the_issue: Leaderboard 500: KeyError when player documents had null/missing 'points', 'level', or 'amount' fields. Fix: Safe defaults with .get(field, default) or 0. Wallet skeleton: multiInjectedProviderDiscovery was dynamically discovering wallets causing skeleton placeholders on slow networks. Fix: Disabled discovery, used explicit static wallet list.
